criteria.text: The unauthenticated Redis debug endpoint cannot expose raw queue data, with regression coverage.
Zoho OAuth and inbound batch processing handle malformed token responses without silent message loss or duplicate replay.
Pending escalation state can be audited and reconciled idempotently, with production writes gated by explicit approval.
Docker maintenance installs and runs conservatively with verified logging, while production cleanup remains approval-gated.
The health endpoint reports the deployed version and required Redis and database health with correct HTTP status.
Critical runtime failures are observable through privacy-safe signals, documented thresholds, ownership, and remediation.
Response latency is measured and reduced without regression in catalog, quotation, escalation, language, or answer quality.
Every public 501 route is implemented or deliberately removed/deprecated with consumer, compatibility, documentation, and test evidence.
Repository worktrees, branches, completion state, and handoff are reconciled without unapproved destructive cleanup.
Canonical local gates pass and approved release, production readback, smoke/E2E, and rollback evidence are recorded before epic close.
